label: Club della Nonna
description: Welcome to Club della Nonna, where Italian passion unlocks the future. The first 1000 members claim free PAZ Gold Coins from the treasure chest. Deposit gold in the family vault to earn daily PARE Silver Coins. Redeem silver for real-world rewards, meals, and exclusive experiences. This is a family-style revolution.
title: Club della Nonna
join_now_description: Nonna gifts free PAZ Gold Coins to the first 1000 family members. Unlock daily rewards, exclusive benefits, and voting on new dishes.
welcome_description: Turn loyalty into treasure: Deposit PAZ Gold Coins in the family vault to earn PARE Silver Coins every 24 hours. Redeem for discounts, coupons, and free meals.
testnet_description: Benvenuto, tesoro! This is a private preview. Coins have no real value and will reset at launch. Top 1000 pioneers get real rewards in October. Rule: Visit every 30 days or lose your spot. Stay connected!

claim.email_required: You must link an email address in your profile to claim your chest.

noCategories: No categories available for this location.
error: An error occurred. Please try again later.
noProducts: No products available in this category.
locationsDescription: Find our restaurants and their details.
menusDescription: Explore our menus and discover your favorite dishes.
exclusive_events_description: Redeem PARE Silver Coins for VIP dinners, wine tastings, and metaverse experiences (coming soon).
community_description: Join our 100,000-strong family to vote, chat, and shape La Piccola's future (coming soon).
metaverse_description: Discover La Piccola in the metaverse with virtual experiences and exclusive rewards (coming soon).
inactivity_warning: Visit every 30 days or lose your spot at the table!

fomo.elimination_warning: If you don’t save your gold coins within 1 day, your account will be deleted!

fomo.stake_late: You didn't stake in time. Your spot may be lost!
